description: This file defines a CDK stack class 'BootstrapTemplateStack' that sets up AWS resources such as DynamoDB tables, EventBridge event bus, and API keys, along with configuring job runners for tenant provisioning and deprovisioning workflows.

classes.name: BootstrapTemplateStack
classes.description: A CDK Stack class that provisions AWS resources for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including event bus, DynamoDB table, API keys, and job runners for tenant management.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the stack, creating resources such as event bus, tables, job runners, and API keys based on provided properties.
